text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm working at my desk, when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
U-um! P-p-please help! It's Opera O... There's
something terribly wrong with her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I don't think I've ever seen her not smiling! Whatever's going on, it can't be good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. Even from a distance, it's clear
that T.M. Opera O is far from her usual self.
choice_data_list: It can't be... Could she be depressed?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Neath the stillness of a wintry sky do I espy
Stars gleaming o'er the gallant Overlord
choice_data_list: (Is she reciting some kind of poem?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is she saying? Now I'm even more
confused...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! It's no good... I wish to exude composure,
yet my beauteous form—draped in
ultramarine—brings me naught but joy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So... She left to go change, but she looks just as
troubled as before! Ohhh, what is going on,
Opera O?!
choice_data_list:
Do you suppose her mood has something to do
with that outfit?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! No way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm?
Oh, it's you, Doto. I thought I heard your voice.
And you've my courtly trainer with you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek! I'm s-s-so sorry! I didn't mean to snoop!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What is there to apologize for? It's only
natural you'd be drawn to this new allure of mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, I speak of this heretofore unseen side of
myself, brought out by my heretofore unseen
outfit!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am radiant as the sun, 'tis true. But am I not also
beautiful, thus, overflowing with serene and
gallant grace?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! You gaze upon the deep aquamarine of a
breaking dawn as it graces the New Year's sky!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The winter sky of New Year's day? Th-that's so
deep! That's Opera O for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her if she's trying to search for a new side of
herself that will suit her new outfit, and she nods.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Quick on the uptake as ever! Indeed, I was
seeking precisely that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And in the midst of my search, who should appear
but you, Doto! This is no mere happenstance, I'm
quite certain!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are always enveloped in a blue aura... and I
do believe I shall take this opportunity to learn
from your brave and melancholic bearing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! M-me?! I-I'm not really sure what I can do,
but I'm happy to be of service!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I assume you too are willing to lend your aid.
Well, Trainer? Where should I begin?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Impersonation? I see! I can embody her spirit by
first imitating her movements! With my talents as
a thespian, this will take no time at all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...!
Well? What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-oh my! Umm, well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I believe your melancholic expression looks
something like... this! Ngh! I need to make it more
heartbreaking, more beautiful...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: More... More blue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through some trial and error, T.M. Opera O
seems to have learned something from how
Meisho Doto carries herself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... In that case, I'd like to see Doto—brimming
with gallantry and gloom—in a more natural state.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A more natural state... So I just need to act
normal? O-o-okay, I can do that!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just so! I appreciate your cooperation. Worry not
about my presence—I shall observe you from the
shadows like a phantom anon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I find T.M. Opera O watching
Meisho Doto in affected secrecy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I am the phantom of the Overlord! Here I
stand, an angel of the shadows, to clandestinely
gaze upon thee!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaagh! Again?! I-it's nerve-racking being
watched like this!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eurgh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto! Are you all right?!
Phew, it appears you're uninjured.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But how awe-inspiring... The way in which you fell
and cried out... That was truly magnificent!
You've taught me much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-uh... This is more than I can take! Aaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a futile endeavor! One cannot outrun a
specter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Meisho Doto finds herself haunted for
several days...
